title: Tensura: Skill Obtain
description: Adds a way to obtain skills from killing entities with a config.
body:
![Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe54d9b36d91cbe9399f39c45a1ebe4812e3165b.png)

**Overview:**

This mod is a configurable addon that gives you control over how skills are obtained.

This addon allows server owners and singleplayer users to define which entities drop a specific skill. Through the file located inside your instance's config file, you can add your own entities and assign your any skills you want.

Preconfigured entities are already included in the config. These are the entities:

**Supermassive Slime**
- Self-Regeneration

**Rimuru**
- Self-Regeneration
- Black Lightning
- Shadow Motion

**Carrion**
- Beast Transformation

**Luminous Valentine**
- Charm
- Holy Attack Resistance


**Hinata Sakaguchi**
- Holy Attack Resistance
 
**Orc Disaster**
- Self-Regeneration
  
**How it works:**

When a player kills a configured entity, the mod grants the assigned skill(s) directly to the player. 

**Features:**

Works server-side and in singleplayer (client-support)
Support for modded entities and custom skills
Adjustable drop chances
